title: ATR teacher ratification record
description: A dated teacher correction of one provisional technique. Never overwrites the provisional record in techniques.json; layers on top as a contribution event, keyed to the ratifying teacher (CARE/provenance stance).

id.description: ratify:<technique-id>:<ratified_by-slug> -- one current record per (technique, teacher); re-review updates in place

verdict.description: confirmed: parse was right · corrected: fields below are the teacher's truth · skip: not yet judged · rejected: not a valid technique entry (e.g. OCR noise, not a technique)

note.description: the deep layer: what this technique is that the name does not carry (connection/musubi, timing, quality of kuzushi). The only authored source for the qualitative layer.

ratified_by.description: person:<slug> of the ratifying teacher, keyed to the data map
